commands.command: playerctl -p chromium play-pause
playerctl -p firefox play-pause
playerctl -p vlc play-pause
for i in {1..10}; do wpctl set-volume $(pw-dump | jq -r '.[] | select(.info.props["node.name"] | test("Chromium"; "i"))? | .id' | head -n 1) 1%+ ; sleep 0.025; done &
for i in {1..10}; do wpctl set-volume $(pw-dump | jq -r '.[] | select(.info.props["node.name"] | test("Chromium"; "i"))? | .id' | head -n 1) 1%- ; sleep 0.025; done &
for i in {1..10}; do wpctl set-volume $(pw-dump | jq -r '.[] | select(.info.props["node.name"] | test("Zen"; "i"))? | .id' | head -n 1) 1%+ ; sleep 0.025; done &
for i in {1..10}; do wpctl set-volume $(pw-dump | jq -r '.[] | select(.info.props["node.name"] | test("Zen"; "i"))? | .id' | head -n 1) 1%- ; sleep 0.025; done &
for i in {1..10}; do wpctl set-volume $(pw-dump | jq -r '.[] | select(.info.props["node.name"] | test("VLC media player"; "i"))? | .id' | head -n 1) 1%+ ; sleep 0.025; done &
for i in {1..10}; do wpctl set-volume $(pw-dump | jq -r '.[] | select(.info.props["node.name"] | test("VLC media player"; "i"))? | .id' | head -n 1) 1%- ; sleep 0.025; done &
wpctl set-volume $(pw-dump | jq -r '.[] | select(.info.props["node.name"] | test("Chromium"; "i"))? | .id' | head -n 1) 120%-
wpctl set-volume $(pw-dump | jq -r '.[] | select(.info.props["node.name"] | test("Zen"; "i"))? | .id' | head -n 1) 120%-
wpctl set-volume $(pw-dump | jq -r '.[] | select(.info.props["node.name"] | test("VLC media player"; "i"))? | .id' | head -n 1) 120%-
playerctl -a stop
playerctl play-pause
playerctl previous
swayosd-client --monitor eDP-1 --output-volume -5 --max-volume 120
swayosd-client --monitor eDP-1 --output-volume +5 --max-volume 120
playerctl next
swayosd-client --monitor eDP-1 --output-volume -120
hyprctl dispatch focusmonitor DP-1 && ydotool key 105:1 105:0
hyprctl dispatch focusmonitor DP-1 && ydotool key 106:1 106:0
hyprctl dispatch focusmonitor DP-1 && hyprctl dispatch split:workspace -1
hyprctl dispatch focusmonitor DP-1 && hyprctl dispatch split:workspace +1
hyprctl monitors -j | jq -r '.[1].dpmsStatus' | grep -q 'true' && hyprctl dispatch dpms off DP-1 || hyprctl dispatch dpms on DP-1
